title: Purple Ender
description: This texture pack changes the color of Ender items and blocks from green to purple.
body:
This texture pack changes the color of Ender items and blocks from green to purple.

![Ender Things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3ce7183ab1b06a093efb9b4df7b5ba036422010.png)

## Changed Things:
- Eye of Ender
- Ender Pearl
- Ender Chest
- End Portal Frame
- End Portal
- End Gateway
